lastFailureMessage:
Startup hook did not produce a capture file. Exit code: 0. stdout: dotnet-yaml:
  Validates format of YAML files

Usage:
  dotnet-yaml [options]

Options:
  -i, --input <i>     File or directory to process
  -f, --filter <f>    Glob to filter directory input. Defaults to .yml and
                      .yaml files in top level dir.
  -v, --verbose       Verbose output
  --version           Display version information
